title: bathysa bathysoides
intro: Bathysa bathysoides, also known as "Mountain Pau-a-Pique," is a tropical plant native to the Americas, belonging to the family Gentianaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce pain. The health benefits of Bathysa bathysoides include its ability to help lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Bathysa bathysoides can be prepared as a tea or infusion, as well as being used in tinctures and salves, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
